calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Shannon L. Watson.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:18 a.m.

Kristen Dean, Esq. appeared for plaintiff ONEMAIN Financial Group, LLC.
Kimberly Lytton, Senior Performance Attorney Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Dean and Ms. Lytton appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Shannon L. Watson.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Promissory Note, Open Book Account and Account Stated was filed on March 20, 2020.
Defendant Shannon L. Watson filed her answer to the complaint on October 22, 2020.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on April 29, 2021, setting trial from September 13, 2021. At that time, the matter was continued by Department 206 to September 20, 2021.
On Septemer 20, 2021, the matter was continued to today, November 8, 2021 for a Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Plaintiff's Exhibit & Witness Lists were filed on July 30, 2021.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on July 30, 2021.
DOE defendants were dimissed on September 14, 2021.

Plaintiff ONEMAIN Financial Group, LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Loan Agreement dated 11/13/2018............................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Plaintiff's Loan Payment History...........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff ONEMAIN Financial Group, LLC, and against defendant Shannon L. Watson, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $4,687.38.
Costs - $310.32.
Total - $4,997.70.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:30 a.m.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Continued To Nov-08-21 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Continued To Sep-20-21 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514
